messages.content: how can I use you in my phone

I can be integrated into your phone as a virtual assistant, allowing you to access my capabilities through voice or text commands. I'll be able to assist you with tasks, provide information, and more, all from the convenience of your mobile device, Shahid.
can you guide me step by step how can I install you in my device

To install me on your device, you'll need to create a mobile app that integrates my capabilities, Shahid. I'll outline the general steps: first, choose a development framework, then design the user interface, next, integrate my language processing capabilities, and finally, test and deploy the app on your device.
